name: NationBuilder Political CRM API
what_it_does: NationBuilder REST API for political campaign and organizing CRM platform. Enables AI agents to manage people and contact records, track tags and memberships, handle event management and RSVPs, manage fundraising and financial data, process survey results, manage blog and website content, integrate voter file data, and sync organizing data with email and digital communication tools.
use_cases: Managing supporter contact records and engagement history from organizing agents
Processing event RSVPs and volunteer coordination from campaign operations agents
Tracking membership and donation data from nonprofit development agents
Syncing people data with email marketing tools from digital outreach agents
not_for: Pure for-profit CRM without community organizing and campaign focus
Healthcare CRM without political/advocacy organizing workflows
High-volume financial processing without organizing-centric workflows
best_when: A political campaign, advocacy organization, nonprofit, or community group using NationBuilder wants AI agents to automate supporter engagement, event management, donation tracking, and digital outreach workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Supporter personal data and political activity records are sensitive. Voter file data has state regulatory requirements. Automated contact must comply with CAN-SPAM, CASL, and TCPA.

auth.notes: NationBuilder uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Nation-level credentials. OAuth for third-party app development. API keys for server-to-server. Scopes control data access. Public developer platform with comprehensive docs.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; free demo and trial
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-contact monthly pricing; Basic, Pro, and Enterprise tiers; non-partisan platform
pricing.notes: Los Angeles company. Founded 2009. Non-partisan organizing platform used by campaigns, advocacy orgs, and community groups globally. Used by campaigns across the political spectrum. 9,000+ organizations.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Supporter personal and political activity data requires careful handling
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 or API key
Non-partisan platform — works for campaigns across political spectrum
Voter file data integration has state regulatory requirements
Automated contact must comply with CAN-SPAM, CASL, TCPA
US data residency only — verify for international political campaigns
agent_readiness.security_notes: Supporter personal and political activity data. SOC2. OAuth2 and API key. US data residency. Non-partisan political CRM. State voter file regulations apply.

security_score_components.security_notes: Supporter personal and political data. SOC2. OAuth2 and API key. US data residency. Non-partisan platform.
